headline: W. R. Berkley Corporation Names Christopher T. Reichardt President of Berkley Oil & Gas
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., April 16, 2026--W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) today announced the appointment of Christopher T. Reichardt as president of Berkley Oil & Gas. He succeeds Linda A. Eppolito, who has been named chair of the business. The appointments are effective immediately.

headline: Travelers Q1 Earnings Beat, Revenues Miss, Dividend Raised
summary: TRV's first-quarter earnings reflect lower catastrophe losses and improved net investment income, partly offset by lower underlying underwriting income.

headline: Gear Up for W.R. Berkley (WRB) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock with Competitive Advantages and 2 We Turn Down
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.
